mfa.title: Two-Step Verification
mfa.subtitle: Enter the code we sent to your email address.
mfa.resendSuccess: A new code has been sent to your email.
mfa.errorExpired: The code has expired. Please request a new one.

auth.verifyEmailFirst: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.

langBanner.message: Your browser prefers a different language.

dashboard.praiseWords: You're amazing! 🌟|True supporter! 💫|Film hero! 🎬|Making dreams real! ✨|You matter! 💛|Incredible heart! 🫶|Story champion! 🏆|Art patron! 🎨|Creative angel! 👼

castingForm.basicsDesc: We need some basic information to get started.
castingForm.personalityDesc: Help us understand your personality and creative vision.
castingForm.whyPlaceholder: Tell us what sparks your interest...
castingForm.dreamPlaceholder: A genre, character type, or scenario...
castingForm.photosDesc: Upload clear, high-quality photos. These are how the casting team will first see you.
castingForm.photosTip: Applicants can upload up to 6 photos. At least 4 required photos must be submitted.
castingForm.photoFrontDesc: Clear, well-lit photo of your face straight-on
castingForm.photoSideDesc: Left or right side profile view
castingForm.photoExpressionDesc: Smiling, serious, or emotional expression of your choice
castingForm.photoOptional1Desc: Action pose, close-up, or creative photo
castingForm.photoOptional2Desc: Another angle or look you want to showcase
castingForm.voiceDesc: Share your voice and social presence.
castingForm.socialDesc: Add at least one profile so we can learn more about you.
castingForm.name: Name:
castingForm.consent1: I give AIM Studio a permanent, irrevocable right to use my photos, voice, video, and submissions for this project and its promotion. This includes AI-generated content using my likeness. This right remains even if I leave the project.
castingForm.consent2: I understand my participation is voluntary with no pay unless agreed in writing. I waive any future claims over materials I submit or content made during my involvement.
castingForm.consent3: I confirm my information is accurate. My contact details can be removed on request, but all production content and materials from my involvement belong to AIM Studio permanently.
castingForm.invalidImage: Please upload an image file only.

applicationSuccess.title: You're In The Spotlight
applicationSuccess.desc: Your application for {roleName} in {projectTitle} has been received. Our team is now reviewing your submission.
applicationSuccess.step1Desc: Our casting director analyzes your photos, voice, and profile for character compatibility
applicationSuccess.step2Desc: Our creative team reviews the submission and makes final casting decisions
applicationSuccess.step3Desc: If selected, we'll reach out via email with next steps for your role
applicationSuccess.receivedDesc: has been received. Our team is now reviewing your submission.

voiceRecorder.title: Voice Recording
voiceRecorder.subtitle: For voice cloning and character matching
voiceRecorder.instructions: Record yourself speaking naturally for up to {minutes} minutes. You can read a passage, introduce yourself, or perform a short monologue. Clear audio without background noise produces the best results.
voiceRecorder.uploadPrompt: Tap or click to upload your voice recording
voiceRecorder.uploadHint: MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, FLAC, WebM • Max 50MB
voiceRecorder.micError: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings, or use the Upload File option instead.
voiceRecorder.uploadErrorType: Please upload an audio file only (MP3, WAV, M4A, WebM, OGG, FLAC)

donate.label: Support Independent Filmmaking
donate.title: Fund
donate.description: Every contribution directly supports independent AI-powered filmmaking.
donate.descSub: Your generosity helps us bring bold stories to life.
donate.quote: Cinema is a mirror by which we often see ourselves.
donate.anonHidden: Your name will be kept private
donate.anonToggle: Your name will appear with your donation
donate.emailPrivate: Your email is private and used only for receipts.
donate.messagePlaceholder: Tell us why you believe in this mission...
donate.donateFooter: 100% of your donation goes directly to production.
donate.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.
donate.thankDesc: Your generous contribution means the world to us.
donate.thankFooter: A receipt has been sent to your email.
donate.pausedDesc: We are not currently accepting donations. Please check back soon.

forgotPassword.codeSent: A 6-digit code has been sent to your email. Check your inbox and spam folder.
forgotPassword.emailNotConfigured: Email sending is not configured yet. Please contact the admin.
forgotPassword.newCodeSent: A new code has been sent!
forgotPassword.resendFailed: Failed to resend code. Try again later.
forgotPassword.resendCode: Did not receive the code? Resend
